records.question: Which employees living at 1241 W 72nd Pl have a supervisor among the other employees?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id FROM employee
JOIN employee AS employee__1 ON employee.supervisor = employee__1.employee_id
WHERE employee.address = '1241 W 72nd Pl'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id
FROM employee
WHERE employee.address = '1241 W 72nd Pl'

records.question: Which employees named Valeria work as Sanitarians at 4033 N Kenneth Ave in Chicago with a zip code of at least 60641 and earn a salary of at most 84800?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id FROM employee
WHERE employee.zip >= 60641 AND employee.address = '4033 N Kenneth Ave' AND employee.city = 'Chicago' AND employee.salary <= 84800 AND employee.title = 'Sanitarian' AND employee.first_name = 'Valeria'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id
FROM employee
WHERE employee.zip >= 60641
  AND employee.address = '4033 N Kenneth Ave'
  AND employee.city = 'Chicago'
  AND employee.salary <= 84800
  AND employee.title = 'Sanitarian'
  AND employee.first_name = 'Valeria'

records.question: Which employees with the last name Langley earn at most 63500 and have supervisors who themselves report to another supervisor?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id FROM employee
JOIN employee AS employee__1 ON employee.supervisor = employee__1.employee_id
JOIN employee AS employee__2 ON employee__1.supervisor = employee__2.employee_id
WHERE employee.salary <= 63500 AND employee.last_name = 'Langley'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id
FROM employee
WHERE employee.salary <= 63500
AND employee.last_name = 'Langley'
